calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-31-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Sam Yuk-Wah Wong and Karen Zhili Wong, appearing on behalf of the minor Lily Xin-Ting Wong, are sworn and examined. William Guan is sworn as an interpretor, to interpret Cantonese to English and English to Cantonese. The Court grants the petition for change of name of the minor to Sherlin She-Teng Wong. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;
